title: Configure CORS for New Origin
description: Add a new allowed origin to the gateway CORS configuration.
steps: Identify the new origin domain and protocol (https://)
Add origin to CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS env variable
Update cors-middleware.ts if using hardcoded origins
Verify: test preflight OPTIONS request from new origin
Check: cookies/credentials still work (SameSite, Secure flags)
Update deployment config (K8s ConfigMap) for staging and prod
